name: The Golf Studio
about: The Golf Studio is an indoor golf simulator venue in Seminole, Texas, offering a premium experience with Foresight Sports Falcon overhead launch monitor technology. It provides a high-tech, comfortable environment for golfers of all skill levels to play year-round, regardless of weather conditions. The facility features hourly rentals, various membership options, and space for private events and group gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Sports Falcon overhead launch monitor for accurate gameplay
Year-round indoor golf不受恶劣天气影响

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons are welcome to bring their own food
BYOB policy - guests can bring their own beer, wine, or non-alcoholic drinks. Cups, coolers, and ice are welcome.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to call them directly at 432-955-6032 to inquire about club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks, including alcohol. Cups, coolers, and ice are also welcome. Please drink responsibly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. This information would likely depend on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is suitable for families and can host group events, but there is no specific information regarding child-friendly features or age restrictions.
